response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct performance segments. 2. For scene 1 (00:00-02:49), identified the song as 'Friday Chinatown' (フライデイ・チャイナタウン) originally by Miki Matsubara (or Yasuha, as noted in the search results). The performer in the video is Hakui Koyori. 3. For scene 2 (02:49-04:59), identified the song as 'Otoko no ko ni naritai' (男のコになりたい) originally by Yui Kano (also performed by Noriko Sakai). The performers in the video are Hakui Koyori and Oozora Subaru. 4. Used search tool to retrieve official lyrics for both songs. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the required metadata and lyrics, following all constraints.
response.global_summary: A live concert video featuring two virtual performers. The video starts with Hakui Koyori performing 'Friday Chinatown' alone, playing the keyboard, followed by a duet performance of 'Otoko no ko ni naritai' by Hakui Koyori and Oozora Subaru.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs 'Friday Chinatown' alone, playing the keyboard on stage.
scenes.song_title: フライデイ・チャイナタウン
